description: The IAM Service Account Credentials API is a Google Cloud service for impersonating IAM service accounts to mint short-lived OAuth access tokens or ID tokens and to sign blobs and JWTs with Google-managed service account keys. It is part of Google Cloud IAM.
summary: Google Cloud's IAM Service Account Credentials API exposes one authenticated HTTP API at `https://iamcredentials.googleapis.com/` for generating short-lived service-account credentials and signing blobs/JWTs; no GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surface was found on this domain.
